mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_comments_id.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO comments ( comments_id, user_id, post_id, community_post_id, content_comments, is_secret, created_at_comments ) VALUES ( #{commentsId}, #{userId}, NULL, #{communityPostId}, #{contentComments}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT c.comments_id, c.community_post_id, c.user_id, c.content_comments, c.is_secret, c.created_at_comments, c.updated_at_comments, u.nickname FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.community_post_id = #{communityPostId} ORDER BY c.created_at_comments ASC
SELECT comments_id, community_post_id, user_id, content_comments, is_secret, created_at_comments, updated_at_comments FROM comments WHERE comments_id = #{commentsId}
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content_comments = #{contentComments}, updated_at_comments = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comments_id = #{commentsId}
